reasoning: Animate t-class noun; θ→t before suffixes; animate locative adds -C(e)weʔ, so hiseeθ → hiseet + eweʔ.
Inanimate noun with plural ooto and locative ooteʔ implies base stem oot (add -o/-eʔ).
Animate noun; x→θ before suffixes; animate plural is -Coʔ, so coox → cooθoʔ.
Animate obviative uses the same class consonant; x→θ, so coox → cooθ.
Animate locative uses -C(e)weʔ; x→θ, giving cooθeweʔ.
Animate n-class; obviative adds -n. Stem already ends in n, so unchanged.
Animate n-class locative adds -neweʔ to the stem hinen.
Inanimate h-class; plural adds -ho.
Inanimate nouns lack an obviative form.
Inanimate; plural woθonohoeno and locative woθonohoeneʔ show stem woθonohoen.
Inanimate nouns lack an obviative form.
Animate h-class; obviative niiʔeihiio indicates base ending in -ii with h-class linking.
Animate h-class plural adds -hoʔ to the singular stem niiʔeihii.
Animate h-class locative adds -howeʔ to the stem.
Inanimate nouns lack an obviative form.
Inanimate locative adds -Ceʔ with s→x before suffix: ceʔibes → ceʔibexeʔ.
Inanimate plural adds -Co with s→x before suffix: benes → benexo.
Inanimate nouns lack an obviative form.
Inanimate locative adds -Ceʔ with s→x: benes → benexeʔ.
Possessed kin term; singular matches the given plural base nesi-.
For possessed animate kin terms, possessor-obviative replaces ne- with hi- and adds final -o: nesi → hisio.
Animate h-class locative on the possessed stem: nesi + heweʔ.

General rules used: (1) Animacy contrast: animate plural -Coʔ and locative -Coweʔ/-Ceweʔ; inanimate plural -Co and locative -Ceʔ; inanimate normally lacks obviative. (2) Each noun belongs to a linking-consonant class C (n, w, h, t, θ), visible in its plural and locative; the same C marks the obviative for animates. (3) Phonology: θ→t and x→θ, s→x before added vowels (-o, -eʔ, -weʔ). (4) Possessed nouns with ne- mark possessor obviative in two ways: for animate kin terms replace ne- with hi- and add -o (e.g., nebi→hibio, nesi→hisio); for possessed inanimate parts add -ineʔ (e.g., neicet→neicetineʔ). These rules yield all filled forms above.
